title: Requirements-driven development process
description: The project must follow a requirements-driven development methodology. Requirements are stored as JSON files following a defined JSON Schema, organized by type (business, stakeholder, functional, non-functional, constraint, interface). Traceability must be maintained between requirements, implementation files, and test files.
rationale: Requirements-driven development (per Karl Wiegers) ensures that all implemented features are justified by traceable requirements, and that all requirements are verified by tests.
author: netkeep80
acceptance_criteria: All requirements are stored in JSON files conforming to the requirement schema
Each requirement has upward and downward traceability links
CI pipeline validates requirement files against the JSON schema
Source code comments reference requirement IDs
